ip_outcome_note: Flavor text names 'Pia' directly. Pia Nalaar, Chief Mechanic (DRC 2) is her named card in the Aetherdrift Commander decks. She is canonically co-founder and Chief Engineer of the Aether Rangers in the Aetherdrift Grand Prix narrative. Confidence raised to high.

trivia_bullets.text: Tune Up is a new card (not a reprint) first printed in Aetherdrift (released 2025-02-14). Its effect — returning an artifact from the graveyard and animating Vehicles as artifact creatures — dovetails directly with Daretti's signature graveyard-artifact recursion ability on Daretti, Scrap Savant, making the flavor text pairing mechanically resonant as well as narrative.

The flavor text names both Daretti and Pia explicitly. Pia Nalaar is canonically present in Aetherdrift as co-founder and Chief Engineer of the Aether Rangers racing team; her named card 'Pia Nalaar, Chief Mechanic' appears in the Aetherdrift Commander decks (DRC, card no. 2). Daretti also has a named card in the main set: 'Daretti, Rocketeer Engineer' (DFT, no. 120), a Legendary Goblin Artificer who leads the Goblin Rocketeers.
"For most people? The odds would be insurmountable," Daretti said. "But we're not most people," Pia replied. — Daretti and Pia Nalaar

Aetherdrift (set code DFT) is the 103rd Magic: The Gathering expansion, released February 14, 2025. The set is structured around ten racing teams from across the Multiverse competing in the Ghirapur Grand Prix; the Aether Rangers represent Avishkar's new post-revolutionary government, the Avishkar Assembly.
